no-restricted-syntax.message: Dark mode is intentionally disabled — never add dark: variants (design-system/design-system.md §5).
Dark mode is intentionally disabled — never add dark: variants (design-system/design-system.md §5).
Dates are day-first ('d MMM yyyy' / formatDate from @/lib/format) — never month-first (design-system §8).
Dates render en-GB day-first — use formatDate() from @/lib/format or 'en-GB' (design-system §8).
Never use recharts default colors — resolve via @/lib/chart-colors (OTHERS_COLOR for fallbacks, design-system §7).
